message:
fix: MCP cass error mapping, dedup TTL expiration test, storage txn fallback logging

Three small fixes:

1. mcp_error.rs: add from_cass_error() constructor to McpToolError for
   mapping cass search failures to structured MCP error responses

2. repro_dedup_bug.rs: rewrite test from documenting forever-suppression
   to actually testing TTL-based expiration — sets a 10ms TTL, sleeps
   past it, and asserts the pattern re-fires. Confirms the architectural
   fix for the dedup suppression issue.

3. storage.rs: replace inline BEGIN IMMEDIATE with explicit match on
   conn.execute_batch() result to log a warning on transaction start
   failure before falling back to individual statements, instead of
   silently downgrading.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
